examples: In order to actualize your goals, you need to take the following steps.
Everything will depend to which extent they managed to actualize things in the first half of 2011.
The whole point of freedom is that it establishes the right and the opportunity for human beings to self-actualize.
What if after educating a client about these realities he still insists on a socially responsible portfolio despite it doing very little to actualize the goal he values?
